heading: Authorization for judicial training on international parental child abduction
label: 9141 Authorization for judicial training on international parental child abduction
notes: Delegation of Authority Pursuant to Section 302(b) of the Sean and David Goldman International Child Abduction Prevention and Return Act of 2014Memorandum of President of the United States, , 80 F.R. 32849, provided:May 7, 2015Memorandum for the Secretary of StateBy the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States of America, including , United States Code, I hereby delegate the functions and authorities vested in the President by section 302(b) of the Sean and David Goldman International Child Abduction Prevention and Return Act of 2014 () (the “Act”), to the Secretary of State.section 301 of title 3Public Law 113–150Any reference in this memorandum to the Act shall be deemed to be a reference to any future act that is the same or substantially the same as such provision.You are authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.Barack Obama.
amendments: Delegation of Authority Pursuant to Section 302(b) of the Sean and David Goldman International Child Abduction Prevention and Return Act of 2014Memorandum of President of the United States, , 80 F.R. 32849, provided:May 7, 2015Memorandum for the Secretary of StateBy the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States of America, including , United States Code, I hereby delegate the functions and authorities vested in the President by section 302(b) of the Sean and David Goldman International Child Abduction Prevention and Return Act of 2014 () (the “Act”), to the Secretary of State.section 301 of title 3Public Law 113–150Any reference in this memorandum to the Act shall be deemed to be a reference to any future act that is the same or substantially the same as such provision.You are authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.Barack Obama.

children.text: in which a significant number of unresolved abduction cases are pending; or
that have been designated as having a pattern of noncompliance under .section 9122(b) of this title
the Committee on Foreign Relations of the Senate;

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of State $1,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2015 and 2016 to carry out subsection (a).

children.heading: Use of funds
children.label: 2 Use of funds
children.text: Amounts appropriated for the activities set forth in subsection (a) shall be used pursuant to the authorization and requirements under this section.
